description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, angular black slide and a metallic gray grip featuring a textured, diamond-patterned surface for enhanced handling. The trigger and hammer are gold-toned, providing a striking contrast to the otherwise monochrome color scheme. The grip appears ergonomically contoured, with a slight flare at the base for improved control. The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared, offering ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of medium length and is integrated smoothly into the slide, with no visible external threading or compensators. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or decorative elements on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a minimalist and modern appearance.
description: A modern, semi-automatic handgun with a black slide, gold trigger, and textured gray grip. The design is sleek and minimalist, with a contoured grip and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the black slide, gold trigger, and textured gray grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile of view 0 with clear visibility of the grip and trigger.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the slide's flat surface and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is metallic gray with a pronounced diamond-patterned texture, providing a secure and tactile surface. It is contoured for ergonomic comfort, slightly flared at the base, and appears to be made of a durable polymer or metal composite. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, emphasizing a clean and functional design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and slightly squared, offering a robust and protective enclosure for the trigger. It is generously sized, allowing for easy finger access, and features smooth edges without any undercuts or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian and unadorned.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard, medium length and seamlessly integrated into the slide. It has a smooth, unthreaded exterior with no visible compensators, ports, or fluting. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no external markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, contributing to the minimalist aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests. The design is simple and functional, lacking any logos or texturing.
